jd:
高级后端开发工程师招聘。负责微服务架构、分布式系统、高并发、高可用、订单服务、支付服务、退款服务、数据库设计、SQL优化、消息队列、容器化部署、CI/CD。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Java Java Java Java Java — primary backend language.
Spring Boot Spring Boot Spring Boot Spring Boot Spring Boot — primary framework.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — schema, indexing, transactions.
Redis Redis Redis Redis Redis — caching, distributed locks.
Kafka Kafka Kafka Kafka Kafka — async messaging, event streaming.
Docker Docker Docker Docker Docker — containerization.
Kubernetes Kubernetes Kubernetes Kubernetes Kubernetes — orchestration.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — deployment and operations.
Git Git Git Git Git — version control.

需要熟悉微服务架构、分布式系统、高并发、高可用、数据库设计、SQL优化、索引优化、事务处理、缓存策略、消息队列、容器化部署、CI/CD、Spring Cloud、Nacos、Prometheus、Grafana 等技术。4+ years Java backend experience required.
